title: athyrium filix-femina var. polysporum
intro: Athyrium filix-femina var. polysporum, also known as the lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Athyrium genus that is native to Asia and Europe. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the lady fern is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of lady fern are thought to include the reduction of inflammation and the promotion of healing in wounds, as well as the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lady fern can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
